instructions: Read AGENTS.md at the root of this repository for available skills and activation rules.
When any trigger keyword matches the user's request, read the full SKILL.md before responding.
Follow TDD-first, Clean Architecture, and YAGNI/KISS principles from the skills.
Preserve Portuguese technical terminology from the original PDFs.
Never modify production code without a failing test first (Iron Law 1).
Domain layer never imports infrastructure (Iron Law 2).
Functions max 15 lines, Classes max 200 lines (YAGNI+KISS).
